item.title: [Daily] Skills.sh snapshot (2026-03-14)
item.description: Daily snapshot. Providers: skills.sh All Time skills: 51860 Trending skills: 21049 Hot skills: 2782 Top All Time: find-skills (538789) Top Trending: find-skills (15304) Top Hot: brainstorming (129)

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#1): brainstorming
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #1 Installs: 129 Source: obra/superpowers Description: You MUST use this before any creative work - creating features, building components, adding functionality, or modifying behavior. Explores user intent, requirements and design before implementation.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#11): building-native-ui
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #11 Installs: 21 Source: expo/skills Description: Complete guide for building beautiful apps with Expo Router. Covers fundamentals, styling, components, navigation, animations, patterns, and native tabs.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#13): expo-dev-client
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #13 Installs: 15 Source: expo/skills Description: Build and distribute Expo development clients locally or via TestFlight

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#14): vercel-composition-patterns
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #14 Installs: 67 Source: vercel-labs/agent-skills Description: React composition patterns that scale. Use when refactoring components with boolean prop proliferation, building flexible component libraries, or designing reusable APIs. Triggers on tasks involving compound components, render props, context providers, or component architecture.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#15): upgrading-expo
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #15 Installs: 16 Source: expo/skills Description: Guidelines for upgrading Expo SDK versions and fixing dependency issues

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#16): expo-cicd-workflows
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #16 Installs: 14 Source: expo/skills Description: Helps understand and write EAS workflow YAML files for Expo projects. Use this skill when the user asks about CI/CD or workflows in an Expo or EAS context, mentions .eas/workflows/, or wants help with EAS build pipelines or deployment automation.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#17): expo-api-routes
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #17 Installs: 13 Source: expo/skills Description: Guidelines for creating API routes in Expo Router with EAS Hosting

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#25): native-data-fetching
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #25 Installs: 13 Source: expo/skills Description: Use when implementing or debugging ANY network request, API call, or data fetching. Covers fetch API, axios, React Query, SWR, error handling, caching strategies, offline support.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#26): expo-tailwind-setup
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #26 Installs: 13 Source: expo/skills Description: Set up Tailwind CSS v4 in Expo with react-native-css and NativeWind v5 for universal styling

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#30): web-design-guidelines
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #30 Installs: 152 Source: vercel-labs/agent-skills Description: Review UI code for Web Interface Guidelines compliance. Use when asked to "review my UI", "check accessibility", "audit design", "review UX", or "check my site against best practices".

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#31): marketing-psychology
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #31 Installs: 25 Source: coreyhaines31/marketingskills Description: When the user wants to apply psychological principles, mental models, or behavioral science to marketing. Also use when the user mentions 'psychology,' 'mental models,' 'cognitive bias,' 'persuasion,' 'behavioral science,' 'why people buy,' 'decision-making,' or 'consumer behavior.' This skill provides 70+ mental models organized for marketing application.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#32): use-dom
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #32 Installs: 11 Source: expo/skills Description: Use Expo DOM components to run web code in a webview on native and as-is on web. Migrate web code to native incrementally.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#33): nestjs-best-practices
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #33 Installs: 10 Source: kadajett/agent-nestjs-skills Description: NestJS best practices and architecture patterns for building production-ready applications. This skill should be used when writing, reviewing, or refactoring NestJS code to ensure proper patterns for modules, dependency injection, security, and performance.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#34): stitch-design
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #34 Installs: 7 Source: google-labs-code/stitch-skills Description: Unified entry point for Stitch design work. Handles prompt enhancement (UI/UX keywords, atmosphere), design system synthesis (.stitch/DESIGN.md), and high-fidelity screen generation/editing via Stitch MCP.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#35): fluxa-agent-wallet
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #35 Installs: 25 Source: fluxa-agent-payment/fluxa-ai-wallet-mcp Description: FluxA Agent Wallet integration via CLI. Enables agents to make x402 payments for paid APIs, send USDC payouts to any wallet, and create payment links to receive payments — all through a standalone Node.js CLI tool. Use when the user asks about crypto payments, x402, USDC transfers, payment links, or interacting with the FluxA Agent Wallet.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#36): better-auth-best-practices
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #36 Installs: 24 Source: better-auth/skills Description: Skill for integrating Better Auth - the comprehensive TypeScript authentication framework.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#37): onboarding-cro
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #37 Installs: 18 Source: coreyhaines31/marketingskills Description: When the user wants to optimize post-signup onboarding, user activation, first-run experience, or time-to-value. Also use when the user mentions "onboarding flow," "activation rate," "user activation," "first-run experience," "empty states," "onboarding checklist," "aha moment," or "new user experience." For signup/registration optimization, see signup-flow-cro. For ongoing email sequences, see email-sequence.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#38): ai-seo
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #38 Installs: 18 Source: coreyhaines31/marketingskills Description: When the user wants to optimize content for AI search engines, get cited by LLMs, or appear in AI-generated answers. Also use when the user mentions 'AI SEO,' 'AEO,' 'GEO,' 'LLMO,' 'answer engine optimization,' 'generative engine optimization,' 'LLM optimization,' 'AI Overviews,' 'optimize for ChatGPT,' 'optimize for Perplexity,' 'AI citations,' 'AI visibility,' or 'zero-click search.' This skill covers content optimization for AI answer engines, monitoring AI visibility, and getting cited as a source. For traditional technical and on-page SEO audits, see seo-audit. For structured data implementation, see schema-markup.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#39): pricing-strategy
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #39 Installs: 18 Source: coreyhaines31/marketingskills Description: When the user wants help with pricing decisions, packaging, or monetization strategy. Also use when the user mentions 'pricing,' 'pricing tiers,' 'freemium,' 'free trial,' 'packaging,' 'price increase,' 'value metric,' 'Van Westendorp,' 'willingness to pay,' or 'monetization.' This skill covers pricing research, tier structure, and packaging strategy.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#40): expo-deployment
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #40 Installs: 14 Source: expo/skills Description: Deploying Expo apps to iOS App Store, Android Play Store, web hosting, and API routes

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#41): coder
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #41 Installs: 6 Source: starchild-ai-agent/official-skills Description: Code specialist for writing, debugging, and technical implementation. Use when the user needs code written, bugs fixed, files edited, or features built.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#42): skill-creator
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #42 Installs: 6 Source: starchild-ai-agent/official-skills Description: Create and scaffold new skills with proper frontmatter, directory structure, and validation. Use when the user asks to build a new capability, integrate a new API, or extend the system with a repeatable workflow.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#43): preview-dev
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #43 Installs: 6 Source: starchild-ai-agent/official-skills Description: Frontend & fullstack development with live preview. Use when the user wants to build a web page, frontend app, fullstack project, or any web UI — including React, Vue, Vite, static HTML, Express, FastAPI, or any framework that produces a browser-viewable result. Also use when the user wants to deploy, publish, or share a preview to the public internet (community publish).

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#44): deep-research
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #44 Installs: 6 Source: 199-biotechnologies/claude-deep-research-skill Description: Conduct enterprise-grade research with multi-source synthesis, citation tracking, and verification. Use when user needs comprehensive analysis requiring 10+ sources, verified claims, or comparison of approaches. Triggers include "deep research", "comprehensive analysis", "research report", "compare X vs Y", or "analyze trends". Do NOT use for simple lookups, debugging, or questions answerable with 1-2 searches.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#45): browser-preview
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #45 Installs: 6 Source: starchild-ai-agent/official-skills Description: Browser preview panel knowledge — the iframe-based Browser tab in the right panel. Use when the user mentions browser, preview, tab disappeared, page broken, blank screen, white screen, 白屏, 页面挂了, tab 不见了, preview not loading, or asks about running services.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#46): wallet-policy
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #46 Installs: 6 Source: starchild-ai-agent/official-skills Description: Generate Privy wallet policy rules from natural language. Use when the user wants to set up, modify, or review wallet security policies — transfer limits, address allowlists, method restrictions, time windows, etc.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#47): skillmarketplace
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #47 Installs: 6 Source: starchild-ai-agent/official-skills Description: Search, install, and publish skills. Use search_skills tool for discovery + auto-install. Manual publish via gateway.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#48): charting
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #48 Installs: 6 Source: starchild-ai-agent/official-skills Description: Generate TradingView-style candlestick charts with indicators. Use when the user wants a visual chart, price visualization, or technical analysis plot.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#49): self-improving-agent
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #49 Installs: 51 Source: charon-fan/agent-playbook Description: A universal self-improving agent that learns from ALL skill experiences. Uses multi-memory architecture (semantic + episodic + working) to continuously evolve the codebase. Auto-triggers on skill completion/error with hooks-based self-correction.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#5): typescript-advanced-types
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #5 Installs: 30 Source: wshobson/agents Description: Master TypeScript's advanced type system including generics, conditional types, mapped types, template literals, and utility types for building type-safe applications. Use when implementing complex type logic, creating reusable type utilities, or ensuring compile-time type safety in TypeScript projects.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#50): copywriting
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #50 Installs: 34 Source: coreyhaines31/marketingskills Description: When the user wants to write, rewrite, or improve marketing copy for any page — including homepage, landing pages, pricing pages, feature pages, about pages, or product pages. Also use when the user says "write copy for," "improve this copy," "rewrite this page," "marketing copy," "headline help," or "CTA copy." For email copy, see email-sequence. For popup copy, see popup-cro.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#8): tailwind-design-system
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #8 Installs: 28 Source: wshobson/agents Description: Build scalable design systems with Tailwind CSS, design tokens, component libraries, and responsive patterns. Use when creating component libraries, implementing design systems, or standardizing UI patterns.

item.title: [Hot] Rank down (1 → 10): ai-video-generation
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #1 Current rank: #10 Delta: -9 Installs: 539 (prev 552) Source: inferen-sh/skills Description: Generate AI videos with Google Veo, Seedance, Wan, Grok and 40+ models via inference.sh CLI. Models: Veo 3.1, Veo 3, Seedance 1.5 Pro, Wan 2.5, Grok Imagine Video, OmniHuman, Fabric, HunyuanVideo. Capabilities: text-to-video, image-to-video, lipsync, avatar animation, video upscaling, foley sound. Use for: social media videos, marketing content, explainer videos, product demos, AI avatars. Triggers: video generation, ai video, text to video, image to video, veo, animate image, video from image, ai animation, video generator, generate video, t2v, i2v, ai video maker, create video with ai, runway alternative, pika alternative, sora alternative, kling alternative

item.title: [Hot] Rank down (11 → 18): twitter-automation
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #11 Current rank: #18 Delta: -7 Installs: 535 (prev 548) Source: inferen-sh/skills Description: Automate Twitter/X with posting, engagement, and user management via inference.sh CLI. Apps: x/post-tweet, x/post-create (with media), x/post-like, x/post-retweet, x/dm-send, x/user-follow. Capabilities: post tweets, schedule content, like posts, retweet, send DMs, follow users, get profiles. Use for: social media automation, content scheduling, engagement bots, audience growth, X API. Triggers: twitter api, x api, tweet automation, post to twitter, twitter bot, social media automation, x automation, tweet scheduler, twitter integration, post tweet, twitter post, x post, send tweet

item.title: [Hot] Rank down (2 → 6): ai-image-generation
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #2 Current rank: #6 Delta: -4 Installs: 548 (prev 557) Source: inferen-sh/skills Description: Generate AI images with FLUX, Gemini, Grok, Seedream, Reve and 50+ models via inference.sh CLI. Models: FLUX Dev LoRA, FLUX.2 Klein LoRA, Gemini 3 Pro Image, Grok Imagine, Seedream 4.5, Reve, ImagineArt. Capabilities: text-to-image, image-to-image, inpainting, LoRA, image editing, upscaling, text rendering. Use for: AI art, product mockups, concept art, social media graphics, marketing visuals, illustrations. Triggers: flux, image generation, ai image, text to image, stable diffusion, generate image, ai art, midjourney alternative, dall-e alternative, text2img, t2i, image generator, ai picture, create image with ai, generative ai, ai illustration, grok image, gemini image

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (31 → 19): agent-tools
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #31 Current rank: #19 Delta: +12 Installs: 533 (prev 546) Source: inferen-sh/skills Description: Run 150+ AI apps via inference.sh CLI - image generation, video creation, LLMs, search, 3D, Twitter automation. Models: FLUX, Veo, Gemini, Grok, Claude, Seedance, OmniHuman, Tavily, Exa, OpenRouter, and many more. Use when running AI apps, generating images/videos, calling LLMs, web search, or automating Twitter. Triggers: inference.sh, infsh, ai model, run ai, serverless ai, ai api, flux, veo, claude api, image generation, video generation, openrouter, tavily, exa search, twitter api, grok

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (32 → 20): nano-banana-2
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #32 Current rank: #20 Delta: +12 Installs: 532 (prev 544) Source: inferen-sh/skills Description: Generate images with Google Gemini 3.1 Flash Image Preview (Nano Banana 2) via inference.sh CLI. Capabilities: text-to-image, image editing, multi-image input (up to 14 images), Google Search grounding. Triggers: nano banana 2, nanobanana 2, gemini 3.1 flash image, gemini 3 1 flash image preview, google image generation

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (33 → 23): p-image
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #33 Current rank: #23 Delta: +10 Installs: 531 (prev 543) Source: inferen-sh/skills Description: Generate images with Pruna P-Image models via inference.sh CLI. Models: P-Image, P-Image-LoRA, P-Image-Edit, P-Image-Edit-LoRA. Capabilities: text-to-image, image editing, LoRA styles, multi-image compositing, fast inference. Pruna optimizes models for speed without quality loss. Triggers: pruna, p-image, pruna image, fast image generation, optimized flux, pruna ai, p image, fast ai image, economic image generation, cheap image generation

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (35 → 2): web-accessibility
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #35 Current rank: #2 Delta: +33 Installs: 26 (prev 17) Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Implement web accessibility (a11y) standards following WCAG 2.1 guidelines. Use when building accessible UIs, fixing accessibility issues, or ensuring compliance with disability standards. Handles ARIA attributes, keyboard navigation, screen readers, semantic HTML, and accessibility testing.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (36 → 4): wrangler
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #36 Current rank: #4 Delta: +32 Installs: 24 (prev 16) Source: cloudflare/skills Description: Cloudflare Workers CLI for deploying, developing, and managing Workers, KV, R2, D1, Vectorize, Hyperdrive, Workers AI, Containers, Queues, Workflows, Pipelines, and Secrets Store. Load before running wrangler commands to ensure correct syntax and best practices.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (37 → 3): cloudflare
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #37 Current rank: #3 Delta: +34 Installs: 26 (prev 16) Source: cloudflare/skills Description: Comprehensive Cloudflare platform skill covering Workers, Pages, storage (KV, D1, R2), AI (Workers AI, Vectorize, Agents SDK), networking (Tunnel, Spectrum), security (WAF, DDoS), and infrastructure-as-code (Terraform, Pulumi). Use for any Cloudflare development task.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (40 → 9): lead-magnets
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #40 Current rank: #9 Delta: +31 Installs: 14 (prev 9) Source: coreyhaines31/marketingskills Description: When the user wants to create, plan, or optimize a lead magnet for email capture or lead generation. Also use when the user mentions "lead magnet," "gated content," "content upgrade," "downloadable," "ebook," "cheat sheet," "checklist," "template download," "opt-in," "freebie," "PDF download," "resource library," "content offer," "email capture content," "Notion template," "spreadsheet template," or "what should I give away for emails." Use this for planning what to create and how to distribute it. For interactive tools as lead magnets, see free-tool-strategy. For writing the actual content, see copywriting. For the email sequence after capture, see email-sequence.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (42 → 7): ai-sdk
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #42 Current rank: #7 Delta: +35 Installs: 31 (prev 19) Source: vercel/ai Description: Answer questions about the AI SDK and help build AI-powered features. Use when developers: (1) Ask about AI SDK functions like generateText, streamText, ToolLoopAgent, embed, or tools, (2) Want to build AI agents, chatbots, RAG systems, or text generation features, (3) Have questions about AI providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, etc.), streaming, tool calling, structured output, or embeddings, (4) Use React hooks like useChat or useCompletion. Triggers on: "AI SDK", "Vercel AI SDK", "generateText", "streamText", "add AI to my app", "build an agent", "tool calling", "structured output", "useChat".

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (46 → 12): vitest
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #46 Current rank: #12 Delta: +34 Installs: 22 (prev 15) Source: antfu/skills Description: A blazing fast unit testing framework powered by Vite

item.title: [Trending] Rank down (4 → 6): agent-tools
item.description: Trending leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #4 Current rank: #6 Delta: -2 Installs: 13921 (prev 13917) Source: inferen-sh/skills Description: Run 150+ AI apps via inference.sh CLI - image generation, video creation, LLMs, search, 3D, Twitter automation. Models: FLUX, Veo, Gemini, Grok, Claude, Seedance, OmniHuman, Tavily, Exa, OpenRouter, and many more. Use when running AI apps, generating images/videos, calling LLMs, web search, or automating Twitter. Triggers: inference.sh, infsh, ai model, run ai, serverless ai, ai api, flux, veo, claude api, image generation, video generation, openrouter, tavily, exa search, twitter api, grok

item.title: [Trending] Rank down (9 → 10): qwen-image-2
item.description: Trending leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #9 Current rank: #10 Delta: -1 Installs: 13876 (prev 13867) Source: inferen-sh/skills Description: Generate and edit images with Alibaba Qwen-Image-2.0 models via inference.sh CLI. Models: Qwen-Image-2.0 (fast), Qwen-Image-2.0-Pro (professional text rendering). Capabilities: text-to-image, multi-image editing, complex text rendering. Triggers: qwen image, qwen-image, alibaba image, dashscope image, qwen image 2, qwen image pro

item.title: [Trending] Rank up (10 → 9): nano-banana
item.description: Trending leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #10 Current rank: #9 Delta: +1 Installs: 13876 (prev 13866) Source: inferen-sh/skills Description: Generate images with Google Gemini native image models via inference.sh CLI. Models: Gemini 3 Pro Image, Gemini 2.5 Flash Image. Capabilities: text-to-image, image editing, multi-image input. Triggers: nano banana, gemini image, gemini 3 pro image, gemini 2.5 flash image, google image generation, native image generation, gemini native image

item.title: [Trending] Rank up (6 → 4): twitter-automation
item.description: Trending leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #6 Current rank: #4 Delta: +2 Installs: 13934 (prev 13909) Source: inferen-sh/skills Description: Automate Twitter/X with posting, engagement, and user management via inference.sh CLI. Apps: x/post-tweet, x/post-create (with media), x/post-like, x/post-retweet, x/dm-send, x/user-follow. Capabilities: post tweets, schedule content, like posts, retweet, send DMs, follow users, get profiles. Use for: social media automation, content scheduling, engagement bots, audience growth, X API. Triggers: twitter api, x api, tweet automation, post to twitter, twitter bot, social media automation, x automation, tweet scheduler, twitter integration, post tweet, twitter post, x post, send tweet
